channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NSF announces $83M investment in integrated data systems and services to advance AI-driven science and strengthen U.S. research infrastructure
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation today announced $83 million in awards through the Integrated Data Systems and Services (IDSS) program. These awards...

item.title: Lab-grown mini brains may predict which Alzheimerâs treatments will work
item.description: Miniature brain models grown from patientsâ cells revealed striking differences in how Alzheimerâs-related tissue responds to an antidepressant. The o...

item.title: NSF launches initiative to unlock dataset value for AI-driven scientific discovery
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation announced a new program to advance AI-enabled scientific discovery by improving dataset accessibility.

item.title: New cancer strategy could stop tumors before resistance develops
item.description: Researchers apply evolutionary theory to cancer, changing treatments before tumors develop resistance, with mathematical models suggesting improved outcomes.
